backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a single `getAppInfo` function returning the app name, version, and an empty icon blob.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the brush/paint tool workflow update for the Background Remover module, linking it to specific source files and test requirement REQ-35.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design token CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'All-in-One Conversion Tool App' that mounts the app at `#root` and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages the active tab state across six modules (Image Editor, PDF Converter, Image Converter, Passport Photo, BG Remover, Video Downloader) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright info, a local-processing notice, and a branded link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component showing the app logo, title, a backend connection badge, and a light/dark theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/TabNavigation.ts: Horizontal scrollable tab bar rendering six navigation tabs with icons and descriptions, highlighting the active tab with primary styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, using an anonymous or identity-authenticated actor depending on login state, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook `useAppInfo` that fetches application info from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/src/lib/jszip.ts: Utility module that lazily loads JSZip from CDN and exposes helpers to create ZIP archives for browser download and convert data URLs to Blobs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover.t: Main BackgroundRemover component that handles image upload, canvas rendering with rotation, brush-based mask drawing, and orchestrates sub-panels for removal, crop, export, and before/after preview.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/B: Renders a draggable slider component that lets users compare the original and background-removed images side by side.
UI panel for configuring the brush tool, including activation toggle, size selection, paint/erase mode, undo, and manual erase actions.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/C: Renders an interactive SVG/div crop overlay with draggable corner, edge, and move handles that translate between display and image coordinate spaces. Handles both mouse and touch events to update a CropBox via a callback.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/E: Provides export controls for the background remover, supporting PNG/JPG download and ZIP download of the processed result, plus zoom controls, reset, and adding a background image.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/R: UI panel for configuring and triggering background removal, offering output mode selection (transparent or custom color), a color picker with presets, and auto-detect and remove-background action buttons.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/u: Custom React hook that manages all state and logic for the background remover tool, including image loading, brush state, mask operations, crop box, zoom/rotation, and the core background-removal algorithm using canvas pixel manipulation.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter.tsx: Top-level Image Converter module component with a four-step tabbed UI (Upload, Settings, Preview, Export) and a persistent left-side image preview panel with a thumbnail list for multi-image management.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Batc: Drag-and-drop and file-input upload panel that displays a thumbnail grid of queued images with individual remove buttons and a clear-all action.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Befo: Renders a draggable before/after slider component that overlays the converted image on top of the original, allowing users to compare them by dragging a divider.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Conv: Provides a settings UI panel for image conversion options including output format, quality, resize mode (dimensions or percentage), aspect ratio lock, and filter presets.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Expo: Displays the export UI with a convert-all button, progress bar, per-image download buttons, and a ZIP download option for all converted images.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/useI: Custom hook that manages image conversion state and logic, including canvas-based format conversion, resizing, filter application, progress tracking, and ZIP download.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor.tsx: Main image editor component that composes canvas rendering, adjustment/transform/crop/text tools, undo/redo, zoom, and export (single file or ZIP) into a full editor UI.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Adjustm: Renders sliders for brightness, contrast, and saturation adjustments with a reset button, delegating state changes to the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropOve: Renders an interactive crop overlay div on top of the image canvas, supporting drag handles (corners, edges, move) to adjust a crop rectangle, with Apply and Cancel buttons.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropToo: Sidebar panel for cropping that provides a button to start interactive canvas cropping and quick aspect-ratio preset buttons (1:1, 4:3, 16:9, etc.), plus a reset option.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ExportD: Modal dialog that lets the user choose an export format (JPEG, PNG, WebP) and quality level, then triggers a download of the edited image as a data URL.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/FilterP: Displays a grid of CSS-filter-based presets (Vintage, B&W, HDR, etc.) and updates the image state with the selected filter ID when clicked.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ImageUp: Provides an image upload panel with drag-and-drop, file picker, and live camera capture (via useCamera hook), loading the selected image as a data URL.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ResizeT: Sidebar panel with width/height inputs and an optional locked-aspect-ratio toggle that calls onResize with the new pixel dimensions when applied.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextLay: Renders draggable and rotatable text layer handles over the canvas display area, translating mouse events into canvas-coordinate position and rotation updates.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextOve: React component providing a UI panel for configuring and adding text layers to an image canvas, supporting font, color, size, shadow, outline options, and click-to-place or center-add placement modes.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Transfo: React component rendering rotate (90°/180°) and flip (horizontal/vertical) buttons that update the image transform state.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/useImag: Custom React hook managing image editor state including brightness/contrast/saturation/rotation/flip/filter/crop, text layers, undo/redo history, and canvas rendering with CSS filters.
frontend/src/modules/PassportPhotoConver: Main passport photo converter page component that handles image upload/drop, preset selection, and composes sub-panels for grid preview, text customization, and export.
Component that renders a canvas preview of multiple passport photo copies laid out on an A4 sheet at 300 DPI, with optional text annotation below each photo.
React component that provides export controls for passport photos, supporting PNG, GIF, and PDF download formats as well as print and ZIP archive options.
React component that renders a panel for configuring text overlay on passport photos, including font family, size, color, bold/italic, and alignment controls.
Custom React hook managing passport photo state and logic, including size presets, image processing with sharpening/enhancement, A4 canvas layout, and text overlay rendering.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter.tsx: Top-level PDF Converter module component with a four-step tabbed UI (Files, Merge/Split, Pages, Create) that composes sub-tools and wires them to the usePDFOperations hook.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/Create: Component for creating a PDF from uploaded or camera-captured images, with optional enhance/compress toggles, per-image canvas enhancement, and ZIP download support.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/MergeS: Component providing UI for selecting and merging multiple PDFs or splitting a single PDF at a page number, with download and ZIP export options for results.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PageMa: Component for managing individual PDF pages, loading thumbnails via PDF.js from CDN, and supporting page selection and drag-to-reorder functionality.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFFil: React component that renders a drag-and-drop upload zone and a scrollable list of loaded PDF files, with options to add or remove individual files.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFUpl: Alternative PDF upload panel component with drag-and-drop support and a file list display, similar to PDFFileList but with drag-active state styling.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/usePDF: Custom React hook that manages PDF file state and operations (merge, split, remove pages, create from images) using pdf-lib loaded from CDN.
frontend/src/modules/VideoDownloader.tsx: React component that fetches YouTube or Facebook video metadata via the YouTube Data API and presents quality-selection options for downloading, without performing actual server-side downloads.
frontend/src/types/declarations.d.ts: TypeScript module declarations providing type definitions for CDN-loaded libraries: pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, and jszip.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 23) for an All-in-One Conversion Tool web app with modules for image editing, PDF conversion, image conversion, passport photo, and background removal. Records architectural notes, known issues, and existing feature definitions.
